## What's Changed

### Features
- support buildinfo by @stijn-q42 in https://github.com/Q42/sqill/commit/79ee418fdf5da8cc3251b3f459f1771c8fa730b5
- tracking and untracking of skills by @stijn-q42 in https://github.com/Q42/sqill/commit/116f32d14958326f530977bb429cc8b0fe8f171c
- upgrade sqill directly by @stijn-q42 in https://github.com/Q42/sqill/commit/55804f07b2ed491d4c2d67630dd66800babf5867
- fresh install of all listed packages with `sqill install` + some cleanup by @stijn-q42 in https://github.com/Q42/sqill/commit/ed2b33f9df444284508a5d09fbef7d4769a809c4

### Fixes
- install script by @stijn-q42 in https://github.com/Q42/sqill/commit/05d4c31fe7de6864057e5413ba0c123005b7f1f9
- various bugs with install and tracking by @stijn-q42 in https://github.com/Q42/sqill/commit/df89a7f80a6aa85f310cf84e55e2545cd309b318

### Documentation
- add release notes flow and release workflow rules by @stijn-q42 in https://github.com/Q42/sqill/commit/cc2a6ec8aaef4e85c2e74249edd71323c6985523

### Other Changes
- update release workflow by @stijn-q42 in https://github.com/Q42/sqill/commit/1e83944b894f7b01c1b357be39de9c6fa9d86cdb
- remove unused search functionality by @stijn-q42 in https://github.com/Q42/sqill/commit/f194047296a8aabb6719728406bba4e7ec208a95
- add tests for tracking and untracking by @stijn-q42 in https://github.com/Q42/sqill/commit/b8a9993ec387f8c4a21770a9e625ec7ecd8cabb8
